title: Life Engine Migration Entry
description: Schema for a single migration entry in a plugin manifest's migrations array.

from.description: Semver range matching the source schema version. Supports x wildcards (e.g., 1.x, 1.0.x).

to.description: Exact semver version records will have after migration.

transform.description: Relative path from plugin root to the migration script.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the migration does.
